presentation.label: Realization predicate

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT1.Spec P) → (G : P.Ambient) → (index : self.TestIndex) → self.Witness G index → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Spec.Realizes

presentation.label: Finite test enumeration

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability.tests

presentation.label: Finite witness enumeration

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT1.Spec P} → CT1.Capability S → (G : P.Ambient) → (index : S.TestIndex) → FinEnum (S.Witness G index)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability.witnesses

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a proposed witness realizes a test.
presentation.label: Realization decision procedure

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT1.Spec P} →
    CT1.Capability S →
      (G : P.Ambient) → (index : S.TestIndex) → (witness : S.Witness G index) → Decidable (S.Realizes G index witness)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability.realizesDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: The application-specific size measure used in CT1's complexity certificate.
presentation.label: Input size

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT1.Spec P} → CT1.Capability S → P.Ambient → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability.inputSize

presentation.plainExplanation: The coefficient in the certified polynomial bound on exhaustive checks.
presentation.label: Work coefficient

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT1.Spec P} → CT1.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability.workCoefficient

presentation.plainExplanation: The degree in the certified polynomial bound on exhaustive checks.
presentation.label: Work degree

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT1.Spec P} → CT1.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability.workDegree

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that the complete CT1 search schedule satisfies the declared polynomial bound.
presentation.label: Polynomial work bound

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {S : CT1.Spec P} (self : CT1.Capability S) (G : P.Ambient),
  CT1.searchCheckBound S self.tests self.witnesses G ≤ self.workCoefficient * (self.inputSize G + 1) ^ self.workDegree
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.Capability.workBound

presentation.plainExplanation: The profile's finite code type for witnesses of the public target on G.
presentation.label: Target code

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.Code

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of the target codes for G.
presentation.label: Finite code enumeration

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} → (self : CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget) → (G : P.Ambient) → FinEnum (self.Code G)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.codes

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition saying that code c is a valid target certificate for G.
presentation.label: Code acceptance

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} → (self : CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget) → (G : P.Ambient) → self.Code G → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.Accepts

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a target code is accepted.
presentation.label: Acceptance decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (self : CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget) → (G : P.Ambient) → (code : self.Code G) → Decidable (self.Accepts G code)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.acceptsDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: The public-target profile's size measure for G.
presentation.label: Encoded input size

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} → CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget → P.Ambient → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.inputSize

presentation.plainExplanation: The coefficient bounding the target-code enumeration.
presentation.label: Encoded work coefficient

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} → CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.workCoefficient

presentation.plainExplanation: The polynomial degree bounding the target-code enumeration.
presentation.label: Encoded work degree

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} → CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.workDegree

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that enumerating all target codes meets the profile's polynomial bound.
presentation.label: Encoded work bound

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} (self : CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget) (G : P.Ambient),
  (self.codes G).orderedValues.length ≤ self.workCoefficient * (self.inputSize G + 1) ^ self.workDegree
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.workBound

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that every public-target witness yields an accepted finite code.
presentation.label: Target encoder

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} (self : CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget) {G : P.Ambient},
  PublicTarget G → ∃ code, self.Accepts G code
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.encode

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that every accepted code establishes the public mathematical target.
presentation.label: Target decoder

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} (self : CT1.TargetEncoding PublicTarget) {G : P.Ambient}
  {code : self.Code G}, self.Accepts G code → PublicTarget G
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetEncoding.decode

presentation.plainExplanation: The proof-carrying target code supplied directly to a local CT1 execution.
presentation.label: Certificate code

formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetCertificateEncoding.Code

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition certifying that a supplied local code realizes the public target.
presentation.label: Certificate acceptance

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} →
    (self : CT1.TargetCertificateEncoding PublicTarget) → (G : P.Ambient) → self.Code G → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetCertificateEncoding.Accepts

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that every public target has a corresponding local certificate code.
presentation.label: Certificate encoder

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} (self : CT1.TargetCertificateEncoding PublicTarget)
  {G : P.Ambient}, PublicTarget G → ∃ code, self.Accepts G code
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT1.TargetCertificateEncoding.encode

presentation.plainExplanation: A proof that each accepted local certificate establishes the public target.
presentation.label: Certificate decoder

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {PublicTarget : P.Ambient → Prop} (self : CT1.TargetCertificateEncoding PublicTarget)
  {G : P.Ambient} {code : self.Code G}, self.Accepts G code → PublicTarget G
